description_long: This object depicts a young adult male with short dark hair and a trimmed beard, dressed in a dark blue collared shirt. The figure is rendered with a realistic facial expression, featuring a focused gaze and slightly pursed lips. The head and upper torso are visible, with the shoulders relaxed and arms not clearly shown. The back of the head and neck are smoothly contoured, and the shirt appears to be made of a soft, matte fabric. The object lacks visible details of a wheelchair, such as wheels, frame, or mobility accessories. The overall appearance is lifelike, but only the bust and head are present, with no lower body or wheelchair structure visible.
description: A realistic bust of a young man with short dark hair and a dark blue collared shirt, featuring a focused expression and smooth contours.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, upper torso, and detailed shirt collar.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the ear, cheekbone, and shirt shoulder.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, neck, and shoulders with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side profile showing the opposite cheek, ear, and shirt shoulder.
attribute_seating_posture: Upright with shoulders relaxed and arms not visible.
